reviews.comment:
Un punto justo para bajar a descansar y recargar agua para los mates, y si tenes mascota es ideal para que caminen y hagan sus necesidades.
Cuenta con espacios verdes y agua para lavar utensillos. Baños limpios. Tienda de alimentos bien provista.

(Translated by Google)
A perfect spot to stop for a break and refill your water bottle for mate, and if you have a pet, it's ideal for them to walk around and relieve themselves. It has green spaces and water for washing dishes. Clean restrooms. Well-stocked grocery store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHeThXQXVRRRAB
